messages.title: Balanced Builder
messages.body: You rebuilt the ULIP picture with strong control: life cover stayed visible while the investment side kept growing.

messages.title: Smart Allocator
messages.body: You understood the split: one part protects, one part invests. Fewer moves can improve your score next time.

messages.title: Keep Exploring
messages.body: ULIPs combine protection and market-linked savings. Try again and align the protection, fund choice, and growth pieces faster.

copy.introHookLine: Rebuild the picture that shows protection plus market-linked savings in one plan.
copy.introHowToPlay: Tap two tiles to swap them. Complete the ULIP picture before time runs out.
copy.scoringTagline: Protection plus market-linked savings can work together in one ULIP plan.
copy.scoringCtaLine: Connect with our relationship manager now!
copy.thankYouBody: Thank you for sharing your details. Our Relationship Manager will reach out to you shortly.

contact.disclaimer: DISCLAIMER: THE RESULTS SHOWN IN THIS GAME ARE INDICATIVE AND BASED SOLELY ON THE INFORMATION PROVIDED BY THE PARTICIPANT. THEY ARE INTENDED FOR ENGAGEMENT AND AWARENESS PURPOSES ONLY AND DO NOT CONSTITUTE FINANCIAL ADVICE OR A RECOMMENDATION TO PURCHASE ANY LIFE INSURANCE PRODUCT. PARTICIPANTS SHOULD SEEK INDEPENDENT PROFESSIONAL ADVICE BEFORE MAKING ANY FINANCIAL OR INSURANCE DECISIONS. WHILE DUE CARE HAS BEEN TAKEN IN DESIGNING THE GAME, {COMPANY} ASSUMES NO LIABILITY FOR ITS OUTCOMES.
contact.tcText: I hereby authorize {COMPANY} to call me on the contact number made available by me on the website with a specific request to call back. I further declare that, irrespective of my contact number being registered on National Customer Preference Register (NCPR) or on National Do Not Call Registry (NDNC), any call made, SMS or WhatsApp sent in response to my request shall not be construed as an Unsolicited Commercial Communication even though the contact number may be registered on DNC.
